description: Notion-style views for Obsidian Bases — Cards Compact, Feed, and Timeline. A lighter build with only the core views. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: Notion-style views for Bases — Cards Compact, Feed, and Timeline. A lighter build with only the core views.
manifest.name: Advanced Bases

name: Advanced Bases

releases.author: Brightwav3
releases.description:
First public release of Advanced Bases: three lightweight, Notion-style views for Obsidian Bases.

## Views
- **Cards Compact** — a native-Cards-style card layout with a Compact toggle for a leaner icon+title+pills row layout.
- **Feed** — a scrolling feed of full note previews with lazy rendering and an optional "New note" button.
- **Timeline** — a Gantt-style timeline with date-grouped lanes, per-lane colors, and Ctrl+scroll zoom.

Every view has a "?" help button in the Bases toolbar with a quick reference for its controls. Localized into 15 languages.

## Installation
Manual install: download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/advanced-bases/`, then enable the plugin in Settings → Community plugins.
